name: Nicole Byer
bio: Nicole Byer is an American comedian, actress, and television host best known for hosting the Netflix baking competition Nailed It, for which she earned multiple Primetime Emmy nominations. Her debut stand-up special, BBW (Big Beautiful Weirdo), premiered on Netflix in 2021.

timeline.ev: Gains recognition on MTVs Girl Code
Launches the podcast Why Wont You Date Me
Releases debut Netflix special BBW (Big Beautiful Weirdo)

accolades: Multiple Primetime Emmy nominations for hosting Nailed It
Emmy nomination for writing on BBW (Big Beautiful Weirdo)
